sentences.text: Thank you for calling Glen West management and realty. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time to submit a maintenance request please visit our website at Glen West dot. Com for vacancies press one for accounting press two for our receptionist press three to receive a quote for a new management Services press four to dial by name press Star. Thank you for calling. Please enter the first one or more digits of the last name of the person you would like to call or press Star to dial by first name or press zero. Please enter the first one or more digits of the first name of the person you would like to call or press Star to dial by last name. Press one for neck hook up and or press two to re and your name. You selected neck hook up and is this. Correct press one for yes or press two for. You have reached the desk of Nick heck help you and he is not available at the moment. Please leave your name your phone number and a brief message and he will return your call as soon as possible.
